creator: lev@FreeBSD.org
text:
Driver outputs "ath0: device timeout" from time to time, mostly whem 802.11n client is associated, but sometimes without clients at all (at night).
  I'm running with BAR debugging (dev.ath.0.debug=4294967296, 0x100000000).
  Log from last three days is attached.
